scripts.build: cd book-site && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('build')) fs.rmSync('build', {recursive:true}); fs.mkdirSync('build'); fs.cpSync('book-site/build', 'build', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('ui-variant', 'build', {recursive:true, filter:(src)=>!src.endsWith('.git') && !src.includes('node_modules')});"
